summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. The job is not a dedupe cluster, has no canonical, and blocks merge/fix/raise_pr. Hydrated open PRs are conservatively kept independent; PRs with unavailable live state are blocked for human re-hydration; one device-pairing approval-boundary item is routed to security handling.
